title: Skill metadata
description: The `skill` object inside a skill workspace's package.json. Validated against every skills/*/package.json by docs/tests/skill-contract.test.js. Adding a new runtime or category is a deliberate edit here.

runtime.description: Toolchain the skill's tests run under. Extending this set also requires wiring the runtime into scripts/run-tests.js.

category.description: Grouping shown as a chip on the marketplace site. Add new categories here so casing and spelling stay consistent (e.g. 'GitHub', not 'Github').

flavor.description: Optional explicit override for the implementation/reference classification that is otherwise inferred from the presence of a scripts/ directory.

featured.description: Whether this skill is surfaced as the featured skill on the landing page.

triggers.description: Example prompts or slash commands that activate the skill. Every skill must declare at least one, so the marketplace's 'Try saying' list is never empty.
